title: AICitationBrief
description: Structured brief for AEO content designed to be cited by AI engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, etc.).

entity.description: The primary entity this page establishes authority for.

description.description: Concise entity description suitable for AI extraction (≤200 chars).

attributes.description: Key-value entity attributes (e.g., founded, location, specialization).

citation_targets.description: AI engines and surfaces this content targets for citation.

qa_pairs.description: Direct Q&A pairs. Each answer must be a standalone, extractable response.

question.description: Natural-language question an AI user might ask.

answer.description: Direct answer in 1–3 sentences. No fluff. Citable as-is.

schema_type.description: JSON-LD schema type to wrap this Q&A in.

authority_signals.description: E-E-A-T signals to include on this page.

structured_data.description: JSON-LD blocks to inject in the page <head>.
